title: Extraction of Tabular Data with Complex Conditional Logic
scenario: Write a prompt that extracts a table of customer information from a text document, where each customer has a unique ID, name, email, and billing address, but only if the customer has a balance greater than $100. The document contains the following text: 'Customer ID: 123, Name: John Doe, Email: johndoe@example.com, Balance: $200, Billing Address: 123 Main St. Customer ID: 456, Name: Jane Doe, Email: janedoe@example.com, Balance: $50, Billing Address: 456 Elm St.' The prompt should generate a table with the customer information, filtered by the balance condition.
constraints: Must use conditional logic to filter customers by balance
Must extract customer information from the text document
Must generate a table with the customer information

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses conditional logic to filter customers by balance and extracts customer information from the text document.
Verify that the generated table contains the correct customer information, filtered by the balance condition.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
